about_summary: Manage files, share links, user permissions, storage policies, WebDAV access, and runtime configuration. AsterDrive ships the Rust backend and React admin panel together for personal, team, and private deployments.
about_resources_desc: Documentation, repository, and license links are available here.
about_capabilities_desc: These modules make up the main administrative work surface.
about_capability_files_desc: Manage files, folders, public links, locks, and trash workflows.
about_capability_access_desc: Cover users, teams, external sign-in, and access control settings.
about_capability_storage_desc: Maintain storage backends, policy groups, remote nodes, and quota rules.
about_capability_operations_desc: Review background tasks, audit events, system settings, and processing status.
